description: Created for the woman of sophistication, this sandal from catwalk is crafted with high quality material to offer unparalleled comfort and is uniquely designed to give your feet that chic urban vibe. Heel: 2"UpperSoft plastic midfoot straps in a thong style with a shimmery effectSoft synthetic leather footbed that is ergonomically curved Embossed branding on the footbedOutsoleTPU outsole with a rubber patch that has herringbone grooves on the forefoot and a grooved patch on the heel for gripSandal careWipe surface with a clean, dry clothDo not store in direct sunlight
